mechanics.excerpt: CHARAGTER CREATION EXPLORER MEDIC Born in the back woods of the planet New Abilene you learned early to be tough and resourceful: Iocal legend has it that you single handedly killed bear at age three_ but was really wolf at age nine you still have the pelt ! Seeking better fortune your family started tarm where you picked up your obsession with piloting and driving: You slept in the tractor and flew the crop duster more ften than your parents did.
